signOut.title: Sign out of fullstackhero?
signOut.description: You'll need to sign in again to access this admin. Any unsaved work in this session will be lost.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: We couldn't find anything at that address. It may be a stale link, a renamed route, or a path that never existed.
notFound.goBack: Go back to the previous page
loading.label: Loading
authShell.recoveryNotice: Account recovery is rate-limited and audited.
authShell.recoveryExpiry: Reset links expire 30 minutes after issue.
forbidden.title: You don't hold the permissions to view this surface.
forbidden.description: Ask a root-tenant operator to grant the permissions below to a role you hold.
brandMark.tagline: Operate every tenant on this instance — identity, multitenancy, billing, and the rest of the system surface, from one place.
imageInput.directLink: Direct link to an image you host elsewhere.
